opportunities.name: Base Builder Grants
opportunities.mechanics: Rolling nomination-based retro grants for shipped Base work.
opportunities.immediate_next_action: Submit self-nomination using prepared artifact after human approval.

opportunities.name: Uniswap Foundation Grants
fit: live Uniswap v4 hook and related tooling
opportunities.mechanics: Foundation grant application for v4 hooks, tooling, security, and integrations.
opportunities.immediate_next_action: Convert brief into application draft with measured impact once onchain metrics are pulled.
blockers: Need fresh verifiable usage and deployment metrics.

opportunities.name: Uniswap Hook Incubator
opportunities.mechanics: Cohort-based incubator for advanced v4 hook builders.
opportunities.deadline: next public cohort reported for July 2026
opportunities.immediate_next_action: Watch cohort timing and submit incubator-ready narrative if deadline opens.

opportunities.name: Gitcoin Builder Profile + Grants Rounds
fit: Ethereum/Base eligible if profile and impact evidence are strong
works well once community support exists
opportunities.mechanics: Builder profile plus round-specific applications and Human Passport checks.
opportunities.immediate_next_action: Create Builder profile and gather GitHub, deployment, and impact evidence.
blockers: No public SINCOR/OrderofChaos33 Builder profile found during discovery.
Round timing must be confirmed at application time.

opportunities.name: Optimism Retro Funding
fit: best fit if impact evidence is strong and widely useful
opportunities.mechanics: Retroactive reward process for measurable ecosystem impact.
opportunities.immediate_next_action: Prepare OP Stack public-goods framing and monitor next round status.
blockers: Need tighter OP Stack impact framing than Base-only framing.

opportunities.name: Fjord Foundry LBP
opportunities.mechanics: Permissionless or curated LBP launch workflow for token distribution and price discovery.
opportunities.immediate_next_action: Complete token sale readiness pack before any launch decision.
blockers: Requires wallet signatures and liquidity decisions.
Should not proceed without human approval.
